ipos.name: Stripe Inc.
ipos.blurb: Runs payment plumbing for online stores. When you buy online, Stripe likely handled it.

ipos.name: Databricks
ipos.blurb: Helps big companies store data and build AI on top. Warehouse for the AI age.

ipos.name: Canva Pty Ltd
ipos.blurb: Design tool for posters, posts, slide decks. Used by 200M+ people. No Photoshop skills needed.

ipos.name: Lendi Group
ipos.blurb: Compares home loans across Aussie banks. Like Trivago, but for mortgages.

ipos.name: NeuroBio Australia
ipos.blurb: Aussie biotech researching Alzheimer's drug. Phase 2 trials running.
